note: Composite educational snapshot. NOT a substitute for live CBP lookups via tool/cbp-wro-lookup. Counts approximate; check live for current status.

title: Active WRO list (composite, 2026-04-30 snapshot)
text: Approximately 50+ active Withhold Release Orders covering: Chinese-region cotton, polysilicon, tomato products, aluminium, hair products, garments produced in XUAR; Malaysian-rubber-gloves producers; Brazilian wood-product producers; Côte d'Ivoire cocoa from specific suppliers; Turkmen cotton (legacy).

title: UFLPA Entity List categories
text: Three lists maintained by Forced Labor Enforcement Task Force (FLETF): (i) entities operating in XUAR that mine, produce, or manufacture wholly or in part using forced labour; (ii) entities working with XUAR government to recruit, transport, transfer, harbour or receive forced labour or Uyghurs/Kazakhs/Kyrgyz/other persecuted minorities; (iii) entities exporting products from XUAR into the US. Hits = rebuttable presumption of inadmissibility.

note: Escalated from WRO to finding; named producers must affirmatively prove no forced labour to export to US.
Largely superseded by UFLPA rebuttable presumption but residual WRO mechanics still apply.
